title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-stack e-commerce platform built with Next.js, featuring real-time inventory management, Stripe payment integration, and an admin dashboard.
tech_challenges: Implemented real-time inventory sync across multiple warehouses using WebSockets and optimistic UI updates. Built a custom Stripe checkout flow supporting multiple currencies and subscription models. Optimized database queries resulting in 60% reduction in page load times.

title: AI Image Generator
description: An AI-powered image generation tool using Stable Diffusion, with a React frontend and Python FastAPI backend.
tech_challenges: Designed a queue system using Redis and Celery to handle image generation requests. Implemented progressive loading and WebSocket updates for real-time generation status. Optimized Docker container size from 2GB to 400MB.

title: Fitness Tracker App
description: A cross-platform mobile fitness tracking app with workout plans, progress charts, and social features.
tech_challenges: Built a custom animation engine for workout transitions. Implemented offline-first architecture with local SQLite storage and cloud sync. Integrated with Apple Health and Google Fit APIs.

title: Component Design System
description: A comprehensive design system with 50+ components, documentation site, and Figma integration.
tech_challenges: Created a token-based theming system supporting light/dark modes and custom brand colors. Built an automated visual regression testing pipeline using Chromatic. Integrated Figma API for two-way design token synchronization.
